briefdescription.para: Centralized fault aggregation and system health monitoring.

detaileddescription.para: The Redundancy Manager subscribes to fault events from all EPS services and aggregates them to determine overall system health. It acts as the single source of truth for whether the satellite should enter Safe Mode or handle component degradation.

Architecture:
Services publish specific fault events (e.g., BATTERY_FAULT_DETECTED)
Redundancy Manager subscribes to these events
Aggregates faults and evaluates system health
Publishes high-level health state changes
Applications monitor health events to trigger state transitions
This eliminates the need for services to directly call redundancy manager functions, maintaining loose coupling through the event bus.
